'i[-ru
[u ?5 B is Lii '91
March24, 1992
YIA FEDERAL EXPRESS
Fair Political Practices Commission
lrgal Division
P.O. Box 1467
Sacramento, CA 95814
Re:Jim Cunneen for Assembly '92, Committe 911275
I am requesting confirmation of advice I received from Alice Hughes of your office on March
24, 1992 over the telephone.
BACK GROI,]ND
Mr. Cunneen withdrew from the 1992 election for the 22nd Assembly District in
December of 1991 and has not raised any funds or made any expenditure toward this
election during 1992. In January of 1992 the committee did make a contribution of
$1,000 to another candidate, return $350 in contributions received during 1991 and pay
approximately $250 in accrued expenses.
Base upon previous advice received in your letter dated February 6, 1992 (File No. A-92-
27) Mr . Cunneen has decided to amend the committee to reflect a future election ,
terminate the current 501 and redesignate the bank account for the future election by
amending form 502. In any event Mr. Cunneen will not appear on the ballot during 1992.
Mr. Cunneen is currently on staff for a member of the U.S. House of Representatives and
as such has requesM a ruling from the House Ethics Committee regarding this matter.
While we expect a ruling soon, the Committee has not responded to our inquiry and as
such we have not made the above mentioned filings as of this time.
101 First Street Number 530 l,os Altos, Califomia 94o.22 415-949-4271
P.id for by thc Clntr.m for A3!.mbly 92 Comnincc. ColibotioE to dE C\metr fo Asmbly Committe .t! aor d.d$ribl. I chriLbl. .otibuti@s for incom. l.r porpolcs.
!-red Hower, Tr€asurer 
' 
$ '*oto *r"'


Fair Political Practices Commission
March 24, 1992
Page 2
QUESTION
Does Mr. Cunneen need to file pre-election statements with the FPPC during 1992?
ADYICE
No. As long as Mr. Cunneen's name will not appear on the ballot during 1992, a pre-
election statement does not need to be frled. Mr. Cunneen does however need to file the
regular semi-annual statements.
I would appreciate your confirmation of this advice as soon as possible. I am currently relying
on this advice and as such will not file a pre-election campaign statement for the period January
1, 1992 though March 17, 1992.
Very truly yours,
Frederick Hower
Treasurer
c: James F. Cunneen
